mapper.select: SELECT CAST(id AS text) AS id, reaction, CAST(place_tag_enrichment_id AS text) AS place_tag_enrichment_id FROM preference.user_place_reactions WHERE user_id = CAST(#{userId} AS uuid) AND provider = #{provider} AND external_place_id = #{externalPlaceId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO preference.user_place_reactions ( id, user_id, provider, external_place_id, reaction, reaction_count, place_tag_enrichment_id, source_modified_at ) VALUES ( CAST(#{id} AS uuid), CAST(#{userId} AS uuid), #{provider}, #{externalPlaceId}, #{reaction}, 1, CAST(#{placeTagEnrichmentId} AS uuid), #{sourceModifiedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE preference.user_place_reactions SET reaction = #{reaction}, reaction_count = reaction_count + 1, last_reacted_at = now(), place_tag_enrichment_id = CAST(#{placeTagEnrichmentId} AS uuid), source_modified_at = #{sourceModifiedAt} WHERE id = CAST(#{id} AS uuid)
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO preference.user_swipe_events ( user_id, provider, external_place_id, reaction, previous_reaction, place_tag_enrichment_id, source_modified_at ) VALUES ( CAST(#{userId} AS uuid), #{provider}, #{externalPlaceId}, #{reaction}, #{previousReaction}, CAST(#{placeTagEnrichmentId} AS uuid), #{sourceModifiedAt} )
mapper.select: WITH latest_enrichment AS ( SELECT id FROM preference.place_tag_enrichments WHERE provider = #{provider} AND external_place_id = #{externalPlaceId} AND status = 'SUCCEEDED' ORDER BY enriched_at DESC NULLS LAST, created_at DESC, id LIMIT 1 ) SELECT CAST(tag.enrichment_id AS text) AS enrichment_id, CAST(tag.tag_id AS text) AS tag_id, tag.confidence, tag.weight FROM preference.place_tag_enrichment_tags tag JOIN latest_enrichment latest ON latest.id = tag.enrichment_id ORDER BY tag.rank_order, tag.tag_id

SELECT CAST(tag.enrichment_id AS text) AS enrichment_id, CAST(tag.tag_id AS text) AS tag_id, tag.confidence, tag.weight FROM preference.place_tag_enrichment_tags tag WHERE tag.enrichment_id = CAST(#{enrichmentId} AS uuid) ORDER BY tag.rank_order, tag.tag_id
mapper.update: UPDATE preference.user_preference_tag_weights SET positive_evidence = CASE WHEN #{reaction} IN ('LIKE', 'SUPER_LIKE') THEN greatest(0, positive_evidence - #{evidence}) ELSE positive_evidence END, negative_evidence = CASE WHEN #{reaction} = 'NOPE' THEN greatest(0, negative_evidence - #{evidence}) ELSE negative_evidence END, like_count = CASE WHEN #{reaction} = 'LIKE' THEN greatest(0, like_count - 1) ELSE like_count END, super_like_count = CASE WHEN #{reaction} = 'SUPER_LIKE' THEN greatest(0, super_like_count - 1) ELSE super_like_count END, nope_count = CASE WHEN #{reaction} = 'NOPE' THEN greatest(0, nope_count - 1) ELSE nope_count END, updated_at = now() WHERE user_id = CAST(#{userId} AS uuid) AND tag_id = CAST(#{tagId} AS uuid)
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO preference.user_preference_tag_weights ( user_id, tag_id, positive_evidence, negative_evidence, preference_score, like_count, super_like_count, nope_count, calculation_version ) VALUES ( CAST(#{userId} AS uuid), CAST(#{tagId} AS uuid), CASE WHEN #{reaction} IN ('LIKE', 'SUPER_LIKE') THEN #{evidence} ELSE 0 END, CASE WHEN #{reaction} = 'NOPE' THEN #{evidence} ELSE 0 END, 0.5, CASE WHEN #{reaction} = 'LIKE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, CASE WHEN #{reaction} = 'SUPER_LIKE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, CASE WHEN #{reaction} = 'NOPE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, 'preference-evidence-v1' ) ON CONFLICT (user_id, tag_id) DO UPDATE SET positive_evidence = preference.user_preference_tag_weights.positive_evidence + excluded.positive_evidence, negative_evidence = preference.user_preference_tag_weights.negative_evidence + excluded.negative_evidence, like_count = preference.user_preference_tag_weights.like_count + excluded.like_count, super_like_count = preference.user_preference_tag_weights.super_like_count + excluded.super_like_count, nope_count = preference.user_preference_tag_weights.nope_count + excluded.nope_count, updated_at = now()
